{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Archlord sacred dagger
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|An [[Archlord sacred dagger]] can change its physical shape.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
